system.label: Booking & calendar admin
system.painHero: Stop taking day-swim and overnight bookings only on Messenger — see which dates are taken and confirm guests from one calendar.

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive website only (amenities, gallery, about, FAQ, contact). Admin preview is a sample; production booking system priced separately.
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: Initial sent to jkimresort@gmail.com via outreachSchedule; autoFollowUp 3d1w max 4.

sources.address: Leal Compound, Brgy. Balite, Rodriguez, Philippines
sources.hours: Day Time Swim: 8 am – 4 pm · Always open (page hours)
sources.notes: Dine-in · Outdoor seating. Price range $. HD assets from Facebook Photos — hero-venue 2048×1536, gallery rooms/kitchen up to 2048×1536 / 1536×2048, logo 959×959, cover banner 960×369.
